label: SLCGP Grant Award Received + ManageEngine on DIR Schedule
detail: Rep hears: 'We did apply for the SLCGP grant' or confirms ManageEngine DIR schedule number is active

label: Forensic Consultant Recommends Splunk — Competitive Bake-Off
detail: Rep hears: 'We're already working with a security advisor on our roadmap' or 'We've been looking at Splunk'

label: Josh Littrell Champions ManageEngine Internally — Budget Pre-Committed
detail: Rep hears from Littrell: 'I want to include this in my FY2027 budget request — what does the proposal look like?'

detail: If Jorge says 'our PD has a CJIS audit coming up' or mentions a DPS/FBI site visit scheduled.

label: City Manager denies IT budget amendment
detail: If Jorge says 'I brought it up but we're not prioritizing new tools this year' or 'the City Manager wants to wait.'

label: DIR cooperative contract confirmed — no RFP needed
detail: If Jorge confirms 'yes, we use DIR contracts' or 'we've bought software through DIR before.'

detail: Rep hears on a call: 'Our ERISA counsel sent us something about a DOL audit at another fund' or 'The Board is asking about cybersecurity after something they heard.'

label: Board Blocks Due to Cost Concerns
detail: Rini says 'The Board approved the budget review but they're not ready to move forward yet' or goes silent after 3+ weeks following an initial positive call.

label: Fund Administrator Identified and Engaged
detail: Rini offers to introduce the rep to the Fund Administrator, or Form 990 research surfaces the named executive and a warm outreach is possible.
